untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-day pattern recognition across specific weekdays (Monday > Friday, Tuesday reversal, Wednesday up, Thursday/Friday down). This requires temporal indexing to past specific calendar days, which cannot be expressed with available indicators that only reference prev_close/prev_open (1 bar back) or fixed moving averages. The 69% probability threshold also requires historical pattern matching, not a single-bar condition. A proper implementation would need day-of-week indexing and multi-bar lookback arrays.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_15 is a complex calendar-based pattern that requires: (1) identifying the previous Monday's close vs. Friday before, (2) confirming Tuesday reversed, (3) confirming Wednesday was up, (4) confirming Thursday and Friday were down, then (5) entering Monday with 69% win probability. Without day-of-week context and multi-bar indexed arrays, this cannot be faithfully translated to the available indicator set. A workaround would require custom code for weekday detection and rolling 5-day pattern validation.
